mapper.sql: id, record_id, check_item_id, check_item_name, specs_content, check_result, judge_result, coordinate,origin_url,task_id,sample_id
mapper.select: select * from test_report_record_detail where record_id = #{recordId} and check_item_id = #{checkItemId} and sample_id = #{sampleId}
mapper.insert: insert into test_report_record_detail (id, record_id, check_item_id, check_item_name, specs_content, check_result, judge_result, coordinate,origin_url,task_id,sample_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{judgeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{coordinate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{originUrl},#{taskId},#{sampleId})

insert into test_report_record_detail
id,
record_id,
check_item_id,
check_item_name,
specs_content,
check_result,
judge_result,
coordinate,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{specsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{judgeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{coordinate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update test_report_record_detail
record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
check_item_id = #{checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
check_item_name = #{checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specs_content = #{specsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_result = #{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
judge_result = #{judgeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
coordinate = #{coordinate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update test_report_record_detail set record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, check_item_id = #{checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, check_item_name = #{checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, specs_content = #{specsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_result = #{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, judge_result = #{judgeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, coordinate = #{coordinate,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT rrd.id, rrd.record_id, rrd.check_item_id, rrd.check_item_name, rrd.specs_content, rrd.check_result, rrd.judge_result, rrd.coordinate
FROM test_report_record rr LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail rrd ON rr.id = rrd.record_id WHERE rr.report_code = #{reportCode}
mapper.update:
update test_report_record_detail
check_item_name = #{checkItemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specs_content = #{specsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_result = #{checkResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
judge_result = #{judgeResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
coordinate = #{coordinate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
origin_url = #{originUrl},
where record_id = #{recordId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and check_item_id = #{checkItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
